title.en: Filling Up at a Gas Station

phrases.en: Dan drove into the gas station and pulled up next to the pump.
phrases.zh: 丹开进加油站，把车停在油泵旁边。

phrases.en: He turned off the engine and pulled out his keys.
He climbed out of the car and stretched his legs.
phrases.zh: 他从车里出来，舒展了一下双腿。

phrases.en: He twisted off the fuel cap and set it aside.
phrases.zh: 他拧开油箱盖，把它放在一边。

phrases.en: He slid his bank card into the machine on the pump.
phrases.zh: 他把银行卡插进油泵上的机器里。

phrases.en: He typed in his PIN and waited for the screen to approve it.
phrases.zh: 他输入密码，等着屏幕确认通过。

phrases.en: He pressed the button for regular fuel.
phrases.zh: 他按下了普通汽油的按钮。

phrases.en: He lifted the nozzle and pushed it into the tank.
phrases.zh: 他拿起油枪，把它插进油箱。

phrases.en: He squeezed the trigger and filled the tank slowly.
phrases.zh: 他捏住油枪手柄，慢慢地把油箱加满。

phrases.en: The pump clicked off when the tank was full.
phrases.zh: 油箱加满时，油泵自动停了下来。

phrases.en: He hung the nozzle back on the pump.
phrases.zh: 他把油枪挂回了油泵上。

phrases.en: He screwed the fuel cap on tightly again.
phrases.zh: 他又把油箱盖紧紧地拧上。

phrases.en: Finally, he took the printed receipt and got back in the car.
phrases.zh: 最后，他拿走打印好的收据，回到了车上。
